headline: DA Davidson Maintains Buy on Broadridge Financial, Lowers Price Target to $214
summary: DA Davidson  analyst Peter Heckmann   maintains Broadridge Financial (NYSE:BR) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $228 to $214.

raw.headline: DA Davidson Maintains Buy on Broadridge Financial, Lowers Price Target to $214

headline: Broadridge Extends Proxy Voting and Disclosure Solution to Support All Models of Tokenized Securities
summary: New end-to-end solution enables issuers, investors, and broker-dealers to manage voting, disclosure, and compliance seamlessly across traditional and tokenized securitiesNEW YORK, May 5, 2026...
